Kelli A. Herzog, Esq., of GROTEFELD HOFFMANN LLP, (415) 344-9670, for Defendant.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion DENIED. Defendant has offered to make its PMK available for deposition. Until the deposition is conducted, it would be premature for the Court to evaluate topics or document requests because it is unclear how the deponent will answer or what it will produce, including whether the parties can reach any agreements during the course of the deposition. Sanctions DENIED. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem to sborrowman@gmail.com.
